name: Japan Industrial Production (METI Indices of Industrial Production)
notes: T2 fallback for FRED JPNPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). All aggregator paths (FRED/OECD/IMF) frozen at 2023-11 — upstream OECD MEI freeze. e-Stat statsDataId 0003446463 is METI's IIP table. Wired §3.1 Stage D.4 2026-04-30. If the table has multiple slices we'll add cdCatNN filter in a follow-up.

name: Japan Tertiary Industry Activity Index (METI Indices of Tertiary Industry Activity)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. e-Stat statsDataId 0003348423 = METI Indices of Tertiary Industry Activity (SA monthly). Services-side counterpart to JPN_IND_PROD. PROVISIONAL — statsDataId cited from e-Stat catalogue; not verified live (ESTAT_APP_ID not available in this branch). cdCatNN filter may be needed for the all-industry SA slice; revisit on first live fetch.

name: Japan Machinery Orders (Cabinet Office Orders Received for Machinery — private sector ex volatile)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. Cabinet Office Machinery Orders Statistics — leading indicator of capex. e-Stat statsDataId 0003193087 cited from e-Stat catalogue; private-sector excluding ships and electric power is the watched headline. PROVISIONAL — not verified live (ESTAT_APP_ID not available in this branch). Likely needs cdCatNN filter for the private-ex-volatile SA slice; revisit on first live fetch.

name: Japan Retail Sales Total (METI Current Survey of Commerce — Commercial Sales)

notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey — average monthly real consumption expenditure YoY for two-or-more-person households (the headline reported by MIC). e-Stat statsDataId 0002070010 cited from e-Stat catalogue. PROVISIONAL — not verified live (ESTAT_APP_ID not available in this branch). cdCatNN filter likely required to pick the real-YoY slice; revisit on first live fetch.
